positive: A stylized, high-contrast illustration of a cosmic animal skeleton – combining elements of a Bengal tiger, a majestic eagle, and a mythological winged serpent. The bones are rendered in polished, celestial ivory, etched with glowing bioluminescent nebulae patterns in shades of deep sapphire, electric cyan, and violet. The composition is centered, showing the skeleton in a dynamic, rearing pose against a minimalist gradient background of deep midnight blue to black. Use stark silhouettes, clean lines, and dramatic rim lighting. Art style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Scientific Illustration, highly detailed, suitable for apparel print, isolated subject, vector quality, screen print style.
negative: blur, text, logo, watermark, signature, jpeg artifacts, lowres, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, muted colors, photo, realistic, cartoonish
